description: It's year-end, and the property manager must reconcile the Common Area Maintenance (CAM) expenses for a commercial property.

nodes.task_description: Compile all actual CAM expenses for the property for the entire year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all relevant invoices and expense records.

nodes.task_description: Calculate each tenant's pro-rata share of the actual expenses based on their leased square footage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates each tenant's share.

nodes.task_description: Compare the actual charges to the estimated CAM charges paid by each tenant and issue a credit or invoice for the difference.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates and sends correct reconciliation statements to all tenants.
